re_space_view0.21.0-alpha.1+dev

In re_space_view::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow2::io::ipc::read

Function re_space_view::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow2::io::ipc::read::read_batch

pub fn read_batch<R>(
    reader: &mut R,
    dictionaries: &AHashMap<i64, Box<dyn Array>>,
    metadata: &FileMetadata,
    projection: Option<&[usize]>,
    limit: Option<usize>,
    index: usize,
    message_scratch: &mut Vec<u8>,
    data_scratch: &mut Vec<u8>,
) -> Result<Chunk<Box<dyn Array>>, Error>
where
    R: Read + Seek,
Expand description

Reads the record batch at position index from the reader.

This function is useful for random access to the file. For example, if you have indexed the file somewhere else, this allows pruning certain parts of the file.

ยงPanics

This function panics iff index >= metadata.blocks.len()
